plugins.faceIDPermission: FitStake uses Face ID to confirm wagers and protect your wallet.

plugins.healthSharePermission: FitStake reads your steps and workouts to verify you hit your goals.
plugins.healthUpdatePermission: FitStake writes nothing back to Health — it only reads.

plugins.photosPermission: FitStake uses your photos to attach proof to a bet.
plugins.cameraPermission: FitStake uses the camera to capture proof of completed bets.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: FitStake records location during your active bet window so we can verify you were at the gym/court even if you forget to open the app.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: FitStake reads your location to verify proof when you submit a bet.

infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: FitStake reads your steps and workouts from Apple Health to verify you hit your goals.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: FitStake does not write to Apple Health.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: FitStake records location during your active bet window so we can verify you were at the gym/court even if you forget to open the app.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: FitStake records location during your active bet window so we can verify you were at the gym/court even if you forget to open the app.
